titleZh: “大空头”查诺斯：当前AI产业链存在巨大“资金错配”；
titleEn: "Big Short" Chanos: There is a huge "financial mismatch" in the current AI industry chain; "AI cloud" is actually a leasing intermediary, and he is bearish on SpaceX.

descriptionEn: When the "water sellers" of the AI wave are raking in profits, is the real return on investment in computing infrastructure a mess, or is it a long-term money printer constrained by physical limits?

A 270% return this year, and over 1,000% since inception. Leopold Aschenbrenner, the AI prodigy who left OpenAI—what exactly did he do right?
